image.title: Da Vinci Cybersecurity: Leading Cyber Security Services in South Africa.

item.title: Apple Sends Alert – iPhones are at Risk
item.dc:creator: cyberpro
item.description:
Around 1.6 billion people around the world have iPhones, and while Apple is usually diligent regarding security, there are two major problems that have surfaced. These problems leave iPhone users completely vulnerable to cyber criminal attacks and if users don’t address, they can steal all of your personal data and even your financial information. The […]

The post Apple Sends Alert – iPhones are at Risk appeared first on Da Vinci Cybersecurity: Leading Cyber Security Services in South Africa..

item.title: Juice Jacking Continues to Be a Cyber Problem in South Africa
item.dc:creator: cyberpro
item.description:
“Juice jacking” may be a new term for some, but it has been around as a method of cyber attack for a long time. The former problem was that it was expensive to install, but now that has all changed. The tools required for juice jacking have become cheaper and easier and it’s now a […]

The post Juice Jacking Continues to Be a Cyber Problem in South Africa appeared first on Da Vinci Cybersecurity: Leading Cyber Security Services in South Africa..

item.title: South African Seniors are Prime Target for Cyber Attacks
item.dc:creator: cyberpro
item.description:
Threat actors are well-aware of the fact that many older people are not very savvy when it comes to technology. Unlike younger generations, they did not “grow up” with digital versions and are often confused. Add to this that some seniors suffer from memory problems and you have a recipe ripe for cyber thieves to […]

The post South African Seniors are Prime Target for Cyber Attacks appeared first on Da Vinci Cybersecurity: Leading Cyber Security Services in South Africa..

item.title: South Africa Facing Continued Financial Fraud Crime Wave
item.dc:creator: cyberpro
item.description:
One only has to read the daily newsfeeds to see how drastic digital financial crime is around the world. South Africa is particularly vulnerable. It’s been reported that around 70% of South Africans have been victims of some form of cybercrime as compared to the global rate of 50%. South Africa has not only maintained […]

The post South Africa Facing Continued Financial Fraud Crime Wave appeared first on Da Vinci Cybersecurity: Leading Cyber Security Services in South Africa..

item.title: Mobile fraud on the rise in South Africa
item.dc:creator: cyberpro
item.description:
As South Africans take advantage of the ease and convenience of the digital financial world, it has become increasingly more simple for threat actors to take advantage. Deceiving the average individual has become rather simple for cybercriminals as the internet brings them a wealth of information. All it takes is one or two rather official […]

The post Mobile fraud on the rise in South Africa appeared first on Da Vinci Cybersecurity: Leading Cyber Security Services in South Africa..
